title: Data Augmentation
summary: Techniques used to artificially increase the size of a dataset by applying transformations to existing data. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Data Enhancement. Start after Augmentation. It opens into DL (Data Augmentation) and GAN-based Data Augmentation.
